summary: Info Ventas (Información Ventas) tab feature fully tested. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend: All functionality working - tab appears in CuentaDetalle, loads clasificacion data, shows table with Marca/Tipo/Entalle/Ultima compra/Cantidad/Ventas (S/)/Compras (#), sorted by ventas DESC, row click opens drawer with drilldown lines, date filters work, total summary shown at bottom.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion returns aggregated data by (marca, tipo, entalle)
Backend: Classification row structure includes: marca, tipo, entalle, ultima_fecha_compra, cantidad, ventas, compras
Backend: Results sorted by ventas DESC
Backend: Only includes SALE orders (no RESERVA) - filters out reserva=true
Backend: Respects fecha_desde filter
Backend: Respects fecha_hasta filter
Backend: Both date filters work together
Backend: Handles empty cuenta (returns empty rows)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion/detail requires authentication (401)
Backend: Detail endpoint returns drilldown lines for specific classification
Backend: Detail row structure includes: line_id, order_id, order_name, fecha, modelo_display, talla, color, qty, price_unit, subtotal
Backend: Detail supports pagination (page, limit, has_next)
Backend: Detail pagination returns different rows on page 2
Backend: Detail handles empty classification (no marca/tipo/entalle)
Backend: Detail respects date filters
Backend: Data consistency - clasificacion.cantidad matches sum of detail qty
Frontend: 'Info Ventas' tab appears in CuentaDetalle tab list (data-testid='tab-info-ventas')
Frontend: Clicking tab loads clasificacion data from API
Frontend: Table displays columns: Marca, Tipo, Entalle, Ultima compra, Cantidad, Ventas (S/), Compras (#)
Frontend: Data sorted by ventas DESC (highest first)
Frontend: Empty classification shows 'sin marca', 'sin tipo', 'sin entalle' in italics
Frontend: Clicking classification row opens drawer (data-testid='clasif-detail-drawer')
Frontend: Drawer shows title with classification (e.g., 'ELEMENT PREMIUM / Casaca / Slim')
Frontend: Drawer shows summary (13 uds | S/ 826.28 | 2 ordenes)
Frontend: Drawer displays order lines with: Fecha, Orden, Modelo, Talla, Color, Qty, P.Unit, Subtotal
Frontend: Drawer close button works (data-testid='close-clasif-drawer')
Frontend: Date filter inputs present (data-testid='clasif-fecha-desde', 'clasif-fecha-hasta')
Frontend: 'Aplicar' button refetches data with date filters
Frontend: Total summary shown at bottom of table ('Total: S/ 4,808.49 | 107 uds')
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly filters out RESERVA (po.reserva = false) and cancelled orders (is_cancel, order_cancel = false)
COUNT DISTINCT on order_id correctly calculates number of unique orders (compras)
Detail endpoint uses COALESCE to handle NULL marca/tipo/entalle matching empty strings
Frontend ClasificacionTab and ClasifDetailDrawer components well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
Date filters pass fecha_desde and fecha_hasta to API correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data for cuenta_id 5744
context_for_next_testing_agent: Info Ventas (Información Ventas) tab feature verified. Backend endpoints: /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion returns aggregated sales by (marca, tipo, entalle) with cantidad (SUM qty), ventas (SUM subtotal), compras (COUNT DISTINCT orders). /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/clasificacion/detail returns drilldown lines with pagination. Both support fecha_desde and fecha_hasta filters. Frontend: Tab uses data-testid='tab-info-ventas', content uses data-testid='info-ventas-tab', rows use data-testid='clasif-row-{i}', drawer uses data-testid='clasif-detail-drawer'. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_info_ventas_clasificacion.py (17 tests). Verified with cuenta_id 5744 which has 5 classification rows and 107 total units.
